readings.Aries: Not everyone processes at your speed. Today, your patience is more powerful than your pace. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Taurus: Something needs to be finished before you can start what's next. You know what it is. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Gemini: There is a thread you dropped three weeks ago that still leads somewhere worth going. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Cancer: Your memory is long and your feelings longer. Not everything from before applies to now. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Leo: What you love, you love completely. This is both your most beautiful quality and your most difficult one. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Virgo: You notice what others miss. This is a gift. It is also an exhausting way to move through the world. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Libra: There is a preference you've been masking as uncertainty. Name the preference. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Scorpio: The threshold you're standing on is a real threshold. Cross it or turn back. Both are valid. The first instinct was right.
readings.Sagittarius: You hold ideas loosely, which is beautiful. Hold the people in your life a little less loosely. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Capricorn: The foundation you've laid is solid. Build something on it today that's for you alone. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Aquarius: You are most difficult when you're most certain. Today, hold your certainty lightly. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Pisces: The wave you're riding will set you down somewhere. Trust where it's going. The question matters more than the answer right now.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
